current_suggestion.pitch: Your Renaissance Periodization and Peter Attia content covers hypertrophy and longevity well, but Alan Thrall steelmans the strength/powerlifting side with a grounded, no-nonsense perspective that cuts through fitness industry noise. He covers programming, technique, and training philosophy with an emphasis on practical application over theory, often pushing back on overcomplicated approaches that dominate fitness discourse. Format is a mix of solo instructional videos and candid conversational pieces — low production ego, high signal.
